# Copilot Instructions

This repository uses:

- FastAPI backend
- React + Vite frontend
- Docker Compose
- JWT authentication
- enterprise architecture patterns

Guidelines:
- generate modular code
- avoid hardcoded values
- use reusable services
- preserve auth flow
- use async FastAPI patterns
- avoid duplicated logic
- maintain Docker compatibility

Frontend:
- prefer reusable React components
- use Axios service abstraction
- keep auth centralized
- ant design theming & UI 5 components look like as SAP ERP

Backend:
- use service/repository pattern
- separate schemas/models/services
- use environment variables
- write scalable APIs

Future integrations:
- Oracle database
- jPOS ISO8583 switch
- API Gateway
